_fields.default_model: Default AI model for chat queries. Available: falcon3:1b, tinyllama:1.1b, gemma3:1b, gemma3n:e2b, deepseek-r1:1.5b, qwen3:1.7b, granite3.1-moe:1b, llama3.2:1b, qwen3:0.6b
_fields.summary_model: Model used for generating document summaries in the Knowledge Graph
_fields.tag_model: Model used for extracting tags from documents to organize them in the Knowledge Graph
_fields.ollama_port: Port where Ollama server is running
_fields.ollama_base_url: Full base URL for Ollama API connection
_fields.embedding_model: HuggingFace model for text embeddings. Options: BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5, BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5. Enables semantic search.
_fields.top_k: Number of top document chunks to retrieve for each answer (1-20)
_fields.hybrid_search_ratio: Balance between keyword (0) and semantic (100) search. 50 = balanced
_fields.chunk_size: Size of text chunks when splitting documents. Smaller = more precise, Larger = more context (256-4096)
_fields.chunk_overlap: Overlap between chunks to prevent losing context at boundaries (0-512)
_fields.dual_mode: Enable dual model mode for enhanced reasoning using two models
_fields.dual_model1: First model in dual mode (fast model for quick responses)
_fields.dual_model2: Second model in dual mode (reasoning model for complex queries)
_fields.threads: CPU threads for Ollama. 0 = auto based on system (0-64)
_fields.batch: Batch size for processing. Higher = faster but more memory (1-8192)
_fields.ctx: Context window size (max tokens). How much the model can remember (512-131072)
_fields.gpu: GPU layers to use. 0 = CPU only, -1 = all GPU layers, N = N layers on GPU
_fields.mmap: Memory mapping mode: 0 = load in RAM (faster), 1 = stream from disk (less RAM)
_fields.numa: Enable NUMA awareness for multi-socket servers. Only enable on servers with multiple CPUs
_fields.dark_mode: Enable dark theme for the web UI
_fields.show_system_info: Show system information panel in settings page
_fields.max_messages_memory: Number of chat messages to keep in memory. Older messages are discarded
